items.title: Add skills directory and import sow-generator
items.description: Add a top-level skills/ directory (Agent Skills spec compatible) and import the sow-generator skill (from a local sow-generator.skill bundle) as a child directory under skills/.

items.title: Consolidate ADR/backlog indices
items.description: Avoid divergence between legacy `.plan/*` indices and the newer `doc/.plan/*` indices by selecting a single canonical location and updating docs/tooling to reference it.

items.title: Consolidate planning indices
items.description: Decide whether `.plan/*` or `doc/.plan/*` is canonical for ADR/backlog indices and update docs/tooling to avoid divergence.
